High-Performance CSV Ingestion Engine

Usage: slurp <csv-file> [options]

Options:
  -c, --config <file>       Configuration JSON file
  -p, --provider <name>     Database provider (sqlserver, postgres, mysql, 
sqlite)
  -s, --server <host>       Database server
  -d, --database <name>     Database name
  -u, --username <user>     Database username
  --password <pass>         Database password
  -t, --table <name>        Target table name
  --schema <name>           Database schema
  --delimiter <char>        CSV delimiter (default: ,)
  -b, --batch-size <n>      Batch size (default: 10000)
  --drop                    Drop table if exists
  --no-indexes              Skip creating indexes
  --no-header               CSV has no header
  --no-parallel             Disable parallel processing
  --timeout <seconds>       Command timeout (default: 300)
  -h, --help                Show this help

Examples:
  slurp data.csv -p sqlite -d test.db
  slurp data.csv -c config.json
  slurp data.csv -p postgres -s localhost -d mydb -u user --password pass
